scope: Set up repo-side Day 7 alpha rails and a daily framework so the next week of passes can build the full app-flow alpha without reopening scope.

implementation.nextDayTarget: Cloudflare Pages alpha deployment verification, first-admin bootstrap verification, broader permission tests, and Drive upload credential planning

externalToolResults.detail: Cloudflare plugin discovery succeeded, but the first Cloudflare OpenAPI search call returned Auth required. No remote Cloudflare mutation or preview deploy was performed.

validation: Node REPL imported scripts/check-alpha-contract.mjs and passed the alpha contract check: 5 personas, 12 workflow actions, and 1 seed evidence item.
Node REPL exercised the alpha state-machine smoke path for submit, revision, resubmit, approval, permission denial, evidence URL validation, mentor meeting, admin export, and misc-admin report.
Node REPL parsed alpha.js syntax with Function.
git diff --check passed with CRLF normalization warnings only.
validationBlockers: PowerShell cannot execute the packaged node.exe: Access is denied.
npm, wrangler, and tsc are missing from PATH in this shell, so npm run check and npm run deploy:preview could not run locally.
Cloudflare MCP API calls currently return Auth required, so remote preview deploy/mutation was not attempted.
selfImprovement: none; no live automation prompt/config change was made.
nextActions: Verify the pushed D1-backed alpha on Cloudflare Pages, including /alpha.html and /api/alpha/state.
Complete first-admin bootstrap verification, then remove or rotate the one-time setup key.
Add broader auth/permission/protected-evidence tests and implement Drive upload credential/OAuth.
